visual_description: In a dark, stone-walled corridor, a group of people in dark robes run urgently through an arched doorway. The scene is dimly lit, with only a faint light source illuminating the path ahead. One person is seen holding a torch, casting flickering shadows on the ancient walls as they move forward.
audio_description: The audio features a low, ominous rumble, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere. There are no distinct voices or clear sounds, only the ambient noise of the environment.
